_comment: Golden reference values emitted by the TS oracle (packages/logic/src/mpm.ts + notes.ts). Regenerate with the script documented in cpp/dsp/README.md. The parity test (parity_test.cpp) embeds these same numbers; this file is the human-auditable record of where they come from. Tolerances: 1e-4 Hz on frequency, 1 cent on note math.
